description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image and a postgres:10 service, with GRADLE_USER_HOME set to the repository's .gradle directory in before_script. Define two stages: build and test, and set variables GRADLE_OPTS, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER and POSTGRES_PASSWORD. In the build stage add a build job that caches the build and .gradle directories (key $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, push policy) and runs ./gradlew --build-cache assemble. In the test stage add a test job that pulls the same cache (policy pull) and runs SPRING_APPLICATION_JSON='{"spring":{"datasource":{"url":"jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/openchessdb"}}}' gradle check to execute tests against the PostgreSQL service.
